description: CompositionNavy blue and white gingham shirt made of 100% cotton, with half sleeves that have a contrast border, full button placket and pocket on left chestFittingSlimWash care Pre-soak the garment before wash Wash inside out with zippers and buttons fastened Preferably hand washed Use only mild detergents Wash dark colours separately Do not attempt to remove stains by spot washing Drip dry on hanger and avoid wringing Flat dry Preferably steam iron This navy blue and white gingham shirt from scullers is a great addition to your wardrobe.  The navy bl ue and white combo gives off a fresh vibe. Pair this shirt with denims or chinos and semi-formal leather shoes for a cool casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size 40Height-6', Shoulders-18"
